title: Generated Cli Adapter Status Check 2026 04 26
goal: Implement #373 by making generated CLI adapter status a non-regression check that reports generated command surfaces, source authority, freshness, direct-edit detection, and edit routes.
non_goals: Block hand-written runtime primitive implementation changes.
Add host-specific tracker or agent assumptions to the package.

intent.outcome: Complete the bounded work for TODO item `generated-cli-adapter-status-check-2026-04-26`.
intent.constraints: Keep the check repo-, host-, agent-, and language-agnostic; command/interface truth stays in contracts, runtime behavior stays in primitives.
intent.latitude: Tighten existing check output and tests instead of adding a new first-line command.
intent.escalation: Escalate when a better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.

execution.proof: Contract-tooling check, generated adapter freshness check, generated-tool conformance, workspace CLI tests, ruff, and planning doctor passed.

invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.

immediate_next_action: Add generated-adapter status inventory to the existing contract-tooling check.
invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.
completion_criteria: The check identifies generated command adapter outputs and owning contract source.
The check reports whether generated outputs are current and flags direct generated-output edits as drift.
The check tells contributors where command/interface changes and runtime behavior changes belong.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: The existing contract-tooling check now reports generated command adapter status by program/output path, generated command surfaces, source contract, freshness, direct-edit detection, regeneration command, and command-vs-runtime edit routes.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py; uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_adapters.py --check; uv run pytest tests/test_contract_tooling.py tests/test_generated_tool_conformance.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json

proof_report.validation proof: All selected proof lanes passed after adding generated adapter status inventory and tests.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py passed and printed generated adapter status; uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_adapters.py --check passed; uv run pytest tests/test_contract_tooling.py tests/test_generated_tool_conformance.py -q passed; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q passed 166 tests; uv run ruff check src tests passed; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json returned healthy.
